evals.prompt: pick up context from the latest session
evals.expected_output: Uses browse mode: runs qrec search --k 10 with no query string, picks the most recent session matching the current project, then gets it with qrec get
expectations: First qrec command is browse mode: 'qrec search --k 10' with no positional query argument
Follows up with qrec get <session_id> to fetch the full session
Does NOT run a semantic search query as the first command

evals.prompt: how did we implement the FTS5 query sanitization in qrec?
evals.expected_output: Uses semantic search with a concrete query string, tries up to 2 phrasings if needed, then gets the relevant session
expectations: First qrec command includes a query string (semantic search mode)
Query string contains relevant terms like 'FTS5' or 'sanitiz'
Follows up with qrec get to fetch session content

evals.prompt: what were we working on with the remotion demo? continue from the latest session on that
evals.expected_output: Treats this as a recency request (latest session on a topic), uses browse mode first, scans project/title fields, picks the matching session
expectations: First qrec command is browse mode: 'qrec search --k 10' with no positional query argument
Does NOT immediately fire a semantic search query as the first command
Follows up with qrec get to retrieve the session
